mapper.select: SELECT account, name, gender, address, phone, mobile, email, motto, created_at FROM employee WHERE account = #{account}
SELECT account, name, gender, address, phone, mobile, email, motto, created_at FROM employee
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (account, name, gender, address, phone, mobile, email, motto, created_at) VALUES (#{account}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{motto}, #{createdAt})
